doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: It presents an implausible EDPB guidance claim that non-holders’ pseudonymized health data is “outside the material scope of GDPR” with weak/unsupported legal anchoring and unverifiable document metadata.
